Description: Unique identifier of the specific anaerobic digester configuration used
Number of days manure spends in the anaerobic digester. Note that this variable is not utilized directly by the module but is utilized by the Economics Emissions and Energy module.

Temperature set point for the anaerobic digestion. This input is utilized in the conversion of $\text{CH}_4$ and $\text{CO}_2$ generation volume to mass; it does not directly influence $\text{CH}_4$ emissions
Fraction of biogas generated in the anaerobic digester that escapes to the atmosphere through unintended leakage and is not collected by the gas capture system
